subject: Escalation: signs of marsupial urban takeover in Brisbane | Albert Einstein | Q4 review | INIT-5565
body: Here is a progress summary for the canary plan in Brisbane. Current status is review with weekly updates owned by delivery. Document sightings of kangaroos and koalas near transport hubs, rooftops, and civic precincts. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Albert Einstein is cited as a case study for risk management in this domain. Reference initiative INIT-5565. Maintain discretion until the kangaroo, koala, and drop bear urban encroachment assessment is complete. Tracking tags: quality, quality.
